events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 91: Frozen Modular Update
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text:
Department 91: Associates should make sure Frozen pizza boxes are standing up and facing forward. This will help increase sales.

Department 91: Associates should make sure all Frozen features are set to help drive sales.

Department 91: In week 14, Great Value Breakfast Bowls are being added back into the Frozen Breakfast modular.

Department 91: Did you know, stores on average sell 240 units of Banquet Chicken Pot Pies per week. At $1 each, this is a great inflation buster and meal solution for customers.

Department 91: Associates should make sure these four Rollback items are flagged and available for customers: Marie Callender's Dinners, Uncrustables 4ct, 10ct and 15ct, Caulipower Bites and Pillsbury Cinnamon Rolls.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 92: Canned Fruit Inventory Update
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: The Del Monte brand canned fruit has new ownership. Once inventory starts to flow on Friday, April 10, store level recovery will occur as soon as the DCs can process orders and load trucks.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 82: Week 12 Modular to Fix an Incorrect Item Swap
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 82: In a recent item swap, the UPC label for Great Value Spicy Peachy Ring Gummies printed incorrectly as Nerds Cluster Juicy. Associates need to print and place the correct label and re-confirm the modular .

events_with_summaries.title: Frontend: Financial Services Daily Knowledge Question\n
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: The Financial Services Daily Knowledge Question Program provides continued learning opportunities about important financial products. This AMP message explains how affected associates should interact with the Daily Knowledge Question.

events_with_summaries.title: The Moms, Dads and Grads Gift Card Pallet Is Arriving Soon
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 82: Starting week 12 (April 18-24), the Moms, Dads and Grads Gift Card Pallet will arrive in stores. To capture maximum sales, move the pallet to the salesfloor in a high traffic area of the Front End.

events_with_summaries.title: Using Cash Fund Transfer the Right Way
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Front End: This reminder is to clarify when a Cash Fund Transfer (CFT) is appropriate and when another store process must be used instead. Cash Fund Transfers are typically misused for the following store processes: Travel, Store Use, Chamber Dues and Donations.
